scripts.dev:engine: export $(cat .env | xargs) && cd apps/engine && cargo run
scripts.test:api: export NODE_ENV=test && ( [ -f .env ] && export $(grep -v '^#' .env | xargs) || true ) && bun test apps/api/src/e2e.test.ts
scripts.test:web:install: cd apps/web && npx playwright install --with-deps chromium
scripts.test:e2e: npm run test:api && npm run test:web
